message:
fix(test): use --sample-size flag in E2E plan tests for faster execution

Tests were timing out (>10 minutes) due to slow inference in debug mode.
The existing --sample-size flag limits inference to N processes, making
tests complete in ~57 seconds while still exercising the full pipeline.

Changes:
- Add pt_core_fast() helper with --standalone and shorter timeout
- Use --sample-size 50 for most tests, 100 for safety tests
- Reduce per-test timeout from 600s to 60-120s
- Add comments explaining sampling doesn't affect safety properties

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
